ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "auth_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Author's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Author's last name */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* Author's birthday */,
  "country_of_residence" TEXT /* Author's country of residence */,
  "hrs_writing_per_day" INTEGER /* Average hours the author writes per day */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Author's biography */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the author's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the author was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the author's profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_country_of_residence FOREIGN KEY ("country_of_residence") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "auth_id" TEXT /* Reference to the author */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_terms" TEXT /* Terms of the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., traditional, self-publishing) */,
  "advance_amount" TEXT /* Advance amount paid to the author */,
  "royalty_rate" TEXT /* Royalty rate for the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_auth_id FOREIGN KEY ("auth_id") REFERENCES authors ("auth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writing_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writing session */,
  "auth_id" TEXT /* Reference to the author */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the writing session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "words_written" INTEGER /* Number of words written during the session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the writing session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_writing_sessions_auth_id FOREIGN KEY ("auth_id") REFERENCES authors ("auth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "commission_rate" TEXT /* Commission rate of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_agent" (
  "author_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the author-agent relationship */,
  "auth_id" TEXT /* Reference to the author */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the literary agent */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the author-agent contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the author-agent contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_agent_auth_id FOREIGN KEY ("auth_id") REFERENCES authors ("auth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_agent_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "auth_id" TEXT /* Reference to the author */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the book */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Publishing date of the book */,
  "ISBN" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number (ISBN) */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the book */,
  "book_format" TEXT /* Format of the book (e.g., paperback, e-book) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_auth_id FOREIGN KEY ("auth_id") REFERENCES authors ("auth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_contributors" (
  "book_contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the book-contributor relationship */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "auth_id" TEXT /* Reference to the co-author */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., co-author, editor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_contributors_auth_id FOREIGN KEY ("auth_id") REFERENCES authors ("auth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_contributors_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editions" (
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edition */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "edition_number" INTEGER /* Edition number of the book */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Publishing date of the edition */,
  "ISBN" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number (ISBN) for the edition */,
  "cover_design" TEXT /* Cover design for the edition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editions_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book edition */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the book (1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_edition_id FOREIGN KEY ("edition_id") REFERENCES editions ("edition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book edition */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of books sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, bookstore) */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated from the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_edition_id FOREIGN KEY ("edition_id") REFERENCES editions ("edition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "auth_id" TEXT /* Reference to the author */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_auth_id FOREIGN KEY ("auth_id") REFERENCES authors ("auth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "auth_id" TEXT /* Reference to the author */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., book signing, conference) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_event" (
  "author_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the author-event relationship */,
  "auth_id" TEXT /* Reference to the author */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "participation_type" TEXT /* Type of participation (e.g., speaker, attendee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_event_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_event_auth_id FOREIGN KEY ("auth_id") REFERENCES authors ("auth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, author, agent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "auth_id" TEXT /* Reference to the author */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., biography, profile picture) */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_updates_auth_id FOREIGN KEY ("auth_id") REFERENCES authors ("auth_id")
)
